istanbul.name: Walk from Karaköy to Galata Tower at sunset along the Bosphorus waterfront
Coffee at Mandabatmaz in Beyoğlu, then stroll İstiklal Street after dark
Morning visit to Süleymaniye Mosque terrace overlooking the Golden Horn
Lunch at Çiya Sofrası in Kadıköy Moda, then walk Moda seaside park
Explore the covered Spice Bazaar, then tea at Hafiz Mustafa near Eminönü
Evening ferry from Eminönü to Üsküdar for skyline views of Old Istanbul
Browse contemporary art at Istanbul Modern, then walk Karaköy pier
Breakfast at Van Kahvaltı Evi in Cihangir, then quiet walk in Cihangir alleys
Visit Hagia Sophia and Blue Mosque early morning before tour groups arrive
Relax in shaded paths at Emirgan Park with Bosphorus views
Dinner at Balıkçı Sabahattin in Sultanahmet, then night walk near Hippodrome
Shop and taste baklava along Istiklal side streets near Galatasaray Lisesi

paris.name: Morning croissants at Du Pain et des Idées in Canal Saint-Martin, then canal walk
Sunset picnic at Champ de Mars with Eiffel Tower views (avoid midday heat)
Browse Musée d'Orsay impressionist galleries, then walk along the Left Bank
Explore Marché des Enfants Rouges in Le Marais for lunch, then Place des Vosges
Evening stroll from Pont Neuf to Île Saint-Louis for Berthillon ice cream
Visit Sainte-Chapelle stained glass in the morning, then Latin Quarter bookshops
Coffee at Café de Flore in Saint-Germain, then walk Luxembourg Gardens paths
Explore covered passages (Galerie Vivienne, Passage des Panoramas) on a rainy day
Montmartre morning walk from Abbesses to Sacré-Cœur before peak crowds
Wine and cheese at Le Baron Rouge near Marché d'Aligre in Bastille
Visit Centre Pompidou modern art, then wander Rue Montorgueil food shops
Evening Seine walk from Pont Alexandre III to Musée du Quai Branly lights

london.name: Morning walk through Borough Market tastings, then Thames Path to Tower Bridge
Visit British Museum early opening, then coffee on Russell Square
Sunset views from Primrose Hill over Regent's Park and the skyline
Explore Tate Modern galleries, then walk Millennium Bridge to St Paul's
Afternoon tea at Fortnum & Mason, then stroll through St James's Park
Brick Lane curry lunch, then street art walk around Shoreditch
Visit Victoria and Albert Museum design galleries on a rainy afternoon
Covent Garden morning browse, then Neal's Yard hidden courtyard coffee
Walk the South Bank from Westminster to Southwark at golden hour
Explore Camden Market food stalls, then Regent's Canal towpath walk
Visit Natural History Museum dinosaurs, then Hyde Park Serpentine walk
Pub dinner at The George Inn near London Bridge, then Thames night views
